meta.title: The deadliest fighter tech you can put in the skies today
meta.description:
This video is sort of a sequel to last week's video about how to make the stealthiest fighter of all time. You can find it here: https://youtu.be/Nwk2J3YGOng

This week, we're discussing how to make the deadliest fighter in the skies today.

If you were put in charge of developing America’s next air superiority fighter—an aircraft purpose-built to dominate the skies over even the most hotly contested warzones of the 21st century—how would you go about doing it? What systems, capabilities and cutting-edge technologies would you build your new fighter around?

That’s a question that was actually posed to America’s premier defense contractors in recent years under secretive developmental programs like the Air Force’s Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) and the Navy’s F/A-XX effort. And it's one we aim to answer in this two-parter. 

Huge thanks to Rodrigo Avella for the use of his incredible artwork in the thumbnail of this video and in our full write-up! Check out his website: https://rodrigoavella.com/

📱 Follow Rodrigo Avella on Instagram for more great artwork: https://www.instagram.com/rodrigo.avella

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social

Further Reading:
Read the complete write up: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/what-kind-of-fighter-could-the-latest-military-tech-really-build/
New fighter programs like NGAD are learning what not to do from the F-35:  https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/new-us-fighter-programs-are-learning-what-not-to-do-from-the-f-35/
What artist renderings tell us about the NGAD fighter: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/what-artist-renderings-tell-us-about-the-ngad-fighter/
Everything we know about the Air Force's new drone stealth bomber: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/air-force-announces-classified-effort-to-field-drone-stealth-bomber/

Citations:
Aim-260: https://www.thedrive.com/the-war-zone/43235/testing-of-air-forces-secretive-new-long-range-air-to-air-missile-is-now-well-underway
LREW: https://www.airforcemag.com/air-force-seeking-faster-longer-range-air-to-air-missiles/
Peregrine Air-to-Air Missile: https://www.raytheonmissilesanddefense.com/what-we-do/air-warfare/air-to-air-missiles/peregrine-air-to-air-missile
Patent for System and Method for Laser-Induced Plasma for Infrared Homing Missile Countermeasure: https://patents.google.com/patent/US20200041236A1/
Gallium Nitride AESA: https://www.raytheonintelligenceandspace.com/news/2021/09/21/compact-aesa-radar
Divide and Conquer: https://breakingdefense.com/2022/04/divide-and-conquer-air-forces-next-gen-fighter-to-get-unique-software-system/
Tempest Radar: https://theaviationist.com/2021/01/18/new-details-about-the-advanced-radar-that-will-equip-tempest-6th-gen-aircraft-revealed-by-leonardos-engineers/
